title: austrobuxus alticola
intro: Austrobuxus alticola is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to Australia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Austrobuxus alticola include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is sometimes used in herbal preparations, such as teas and extracts, although further research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
